name: Mori Dining Table
subtitle: Solid Walnut, Oval Top
description: Mori (森, 'forest') is a dining table that earns its place at the centre of family life. The oval top in solid black walnut is jointed from full-width planks — no veneers, no shortcuts. The chamfered solid steel legs are welded at a precise 8° splay, creating a base with visual lightness despite its considerable physical weight.
care: Wipe spills immediately with a dry cloth. Apply hardwax oil twice annually. Use felt pads under all objects placed on the surface. Avoid tablecloths that trap moisture.
shipping: White-glove delivery. 2-person crew. Assembly and feet installation included.
metaDescription: Mori Dining Table — oval solid walnut top on blackened steel legs. Seats 6–8. Crafted in Denmark. From $3,400 — BeautyHome.
altText: Mori dining table with oval solid walnut top and chamfered blackened steel legs, styled with linen chairs
